data.title: isolation:worktree sub-agent runs review but leaves staged changes uncommitted (commit workflow not completed)
data.description: During sprint, the 0686-d3b2 sub-agent dispatched via isolation:worktree ran the code reviewer and returned REVIEW_RESULT output, but did not call record-review.sh or git commit. This left staged changes in the main session worktree after the worktree isolation auto-merged. The orchestrator had to recover by re-recording the review, re-running record-test-status.sh, and committing manually. Root cause: sub-agent dispatch prompt said 'Follow COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md to commit' but the sub-agent may have treated the REVIEW_RESULT as the terminal output rather than continuing to record/commit.
